polymarket.title: Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need to produce exactly ONE paragraph, starting with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed: followed by specific reasons. Mention numbers and names where available. Max 80 words. Data: only one market: "Will Ethereum dip to $1,500 by December 31, 2026?: Yes 38% (vol $117,248)". So sentiment: 38% chance of dip to $1500, implying 62% chance not dip (i.e., stays above). That suggests bullish sentiment (more likely not dip). So start with "Bullish:" then explain: 38% probability of dip, volume $117k, implying 62% confidence ETH stays above $1.5k by end 2026, indicating bullish outlook. Keep within 80 words. Let's craft ~30 words.

"Bullish: The prediction market shows only a 38% chance Ethereum will fall to $1,500 by Dec 31 2026, with $117,248 traded, implying a 62% likelihood it remains above that level, indicating overall optimism about ETH’s price trajectory."

Count words: Bullish:(1) The2 prediction3 market4 shows5 only6 a7 38%8 chance9 Ethereum10 will
